title: Vanilla NNS
description: This is a simple Modpack that enhances the Vanilla Experience for Multiplayer. But will still let Vanilla players join.
body:
This Modpack is mainly a Client Side improvement mod that includes Quality of Life features. 
This works on Vanilla Servers but some mods are better if also installed on the Server.

It adds QoL features like a Minimap, better animations and a Party and Voice Chat system. 
All of these things are too make the Vanilla Multiplayer a better experience.
